form.formComment: Hit the frame latest (24.70) when third at Goulburn in a Grade 3/4. Has never missed the placings from four starts off this box. Key chance and should go close.

form.formComment: Has not shown much in recent runs. Could only manage eighth last time out over 400m at Bulli. Prepared to risk this time.

form.formComment: At the last outing finished 4th over 520m at this track beaten 7 lengths (30.08) behind Towering Earl in a Grade 5 on April 13. Looks a solid contender.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Came together in the turn to the back straight and lost ground.

form.formComment: Won two starts back after racing on the pace at this track over 520m in 29.91. Followed that up with a minor placing over 520m at this track at Grade 4/5 a week-and-a-half ago. Rates highly on best form. Must include.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Passing the catching pen raced tightly, shifted out and came together.

form.formComment: Good effort last time when third (21.03) over 365m at this track. Looks tested in this line-up.
